title: Quick Start Guide - Emu - First Screen, Charge Case/ Pairing 1 - zoom in/out
scenario: Verify zoom in/out functionality on the first screen of Emu Quick Start Guide by clicking the blue circle button on Charge Case
steps: Go to Device Settings > Quick Start Guide.
Click the blue circle button on Charge Case.
Verify the earbud zooms in with text matching Figma Pairing (Option 1) screen.
Click the blue circle button again.
Verify the screen zooms out to the original view.
expected: On first click, the earbud zooms in with text matching Figma Pairing (Option 1) screen. On second click, the screen zooms out to the original view.
